title: Nm-seq
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"39h9l","text":"The ribose of RNA nucleotides can be 2'-O-methylated (Nm). Despite advances in high-throughput detection, its inert chemical nature still limits sensitivity and precludes mapping in messenger RNA (mRNA). We leveraged the differential reactivity of 2'-O-methylated and 2'-hydroxylated nucleosides to periodate oxidation to develop Nm-seq, a sensitive method for transcriptome-wide mapping of Nm with base precision. This protocol accompanies Dai et al, Nature Methods, published online May 15, 2017 (10.1038/nmeth.4294).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

Protect from light.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fbaoo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vldoc","text":"Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"0q2xb","text":"Standard molecular biology lab equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Set up the following fragmentation reaction in a thin-walled 200 μl PCR tube. Mix well by vortex and spin down.

<a href=http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/5485/original/Supplementary Protocol 1 03152017 table1.pdf?1492068835> <img src=http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/5485/original/Supplementary Protocol 1 03152017 table1.pdf?1492068835>

Incubate at 95 °C for 5 min in a pre-heated thermal cycler block with the heated lid closed. Remove tubes from block and immediately add 2 μl of stop solution. Mix well by vortex and spin down, and place on ice.

Purify fragmented RNA using RNA Clean & Concentraton-5 kit, according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute in 15 μl molecular biology grade, RNase-free water. Note that each RNA Clean & Concentrator-5 column is suitable for purification of up to 10 μg RNA.
Set up the following 3’ end repair reaction in a thin-walled 200 μl PCR tube. Mix well by gentle tapping and spin down.

<a href=http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/5487/original/Supplementary Protocol 1 03152017 table2.pdf?1492068903> <img src=http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/5487/original/Supplementary Protocol 1 03152017 table2.pdf?1492068903>
Incubate at 37°C for 30 minutes.
Purify 3’ end-repaired fragmented RNA using RNA Clean & Concentraton-5 kit, according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute in 15 μl molecular biology grade, RNase-free water.
Set up the following oxidation-elimination reaction in a dark tube. Mix well by vortex and spin down.

<a href=http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/5489/original/Supplementary Protocol 1 03152017 table3.pdf?1492068926> <img src=http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/5489/original/Supplementary Protocol 1 03152017 table3.pdf?1492068926>
Incubate at 37 °C for 30 minutes with shaking.
Quench the reaction by adding 2 μl of ethylene glycol. Mix well and spin down.
Dephosphorylate by adding 5 μl of CutSmart Buffer (10X), 2 μl of rSAP enzyme (2 units) and 1 μl of molecular biology grade, RNase-free water (total reaction volume of 50 μl), mix well and spin down.
Incubate at 37 °C for 30 minutes with shaking.
Purify RNA using RNA Clean & Concentrator-5 kit, according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute in 32 μl molecular biology grade, RNase-free water.
Repeat steps 7-12 seven more times.
Repeat steps 7-9 once. Make sure not perform dephosphorylation (steps 10-11).
Purify RNA using RNA Clean & Concentraton-5 kit, according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute in 32 μl molecular biology grade, RNase-free water.
Set up the following 5’ dephosphorylation reaction. Mix well by gentle tapping and spin down.

<a href=http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/5491/original/Supplementary Protocol 1 03152017 table4.pdf?1492068949> <img src=http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/5491/original/Supplementary Protocol 1 03152017 table4.pdf?1492068949>
Incubate at 37 °C for 30 minutes.
Purify RNA using RNA Clean & Concentraton-5 kit, according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute in 8 μl molecular biology grade, RNase-free water.

Use RNA from step 18 to construct a small RNA library using NEBNext® Small RNA Library Prep Set for Illumina, according to the manufacturer’s instruction, with the exception that 3’ adaptor ligation should be performed overnight at 16 °C.
None
